records.m_Talk_ENG: We're here. Just ahead is the Rebuilt City.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though for something called a city, it doesn't look that bustling.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Lee Jisoo speaking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't expect you to call from an unknown number. We gave you a secure comms device.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't expect you to call from an unknown number. We gave you a secure comms device.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It broke. And there's nowhere around here to get it fixed.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It broke. And there's nowhere around here to get it fixed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Took you long enough to report in.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Took you long enough to report in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you found the target?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you found the target?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you found the target?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found someone who might be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found someone who might be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found someone who might be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I need more time to be sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I need more time to be sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I need more time to be sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do what you must.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do what you must.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do what you must.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you take too long, another unit will be sent to finish the job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you take too long, another unit will be sent to finish the job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you take too long, another unit will be sent to finish the job.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Felix may have given you this mission, but this isn't your personal vendetta.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's sum this up.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand that you broke some guy's phone and now you have to pay for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what does that have to do with you working at our company?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what does that have to do with you working at our company?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't your company need at least one security guard?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to wander into dangerous Corrupted Areas a lot. If you hire me, I'll keep you safe.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We do need people, yes, but safety isn't our only concern.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before you sign, there are <color=#ffd34c>three rules</color> you'll have to follow while working with us.


8vSpeak.





records.m_Talk_FRA: First, no complaining about food.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We eat rice every meal. And that includes steamed eggs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We eat rice every meal. And that includes steamed eggs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We eat rice every meal. And that includes steamed eggs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No problem. The kid's cooking suited my taste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Second, don't give up just because you think you lack talent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Second, don't give up just because you think you lack talent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Second, don't give up just because you think you lack talent.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If there's something to learn besides swinging a sword, I'll at least give it a try.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's your company called?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's your company called?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's your company called?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nostalgia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nostalgia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nostalgia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not really a company but a research lab. We focus more on studies than business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not really a company but a research lab. We focus more on studies than business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not really a company but a research lab. We focus more on studies than business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A research lab?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A research lab?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A research lab?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So how do you fund it? You rich or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So how do you fund it? You rich or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So how do you fund it? You rich or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I get a stipend every month. My last company treated me pretty well when I left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I get a stipend every month. My last company treated me pretty well when I left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I get a stipend every month. My last company treated me pretty well when I left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Running an entire lab with a stipend? You must be a hero to them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Running an entire lab with a stipend? You must be a hero to them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Running an entire lab with a stipend? You must be a hero to them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I get to do whatever I want in return. So I'd say we're even.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I get to do whatever I want in return. So I'd say we're even.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I get to do whatever I want in return. So I'd say we're even.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, when I first saw your run-down base, I thought you couldn't even pay your staff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, when I first saw your run-down base, I thought you couldn't even pay your staff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, when I first saw your run-down base, I thought you couldn't even pay your staff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I could build something better, sure. But what's the point?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I could build something better, sure. But what's the point?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I could build something better, sure. But what's the point?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Ink Rain in this KS region follows a pattern. We move our lab around to stay aligned with it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Ink Rain in this KS region follows a pattern. We move our lab around to stay aligned with it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Ink Rain in this KS region follows a pattern. We move our lab around to stay aligned with it.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're that worried about the Ink Rain, why not set it up somewhere safe in the city?

records.m_Talk_DEU: The Ink Rain's energy we study dissipates fast. We have to be close to the scene to harvest it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Ink Rain's energy we study dissipates fast. We have to be close to the scene to harvest it.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Something you only get once but can never touch again.



root.m_Talk_FRA: Lee Jisoo speaking.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't expect you to call from an unknown number. We gave you a secure comms device.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Took you long enough to report in.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you found the target?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you found the target?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I found someone who might be.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But I need more time to be sure.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Do what you must.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But if you take too long, another unit will be sent to finish the job.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Felix may have given you this mission, but this isn't your personal vendetta.



root.m_Talk_FRA: First, no complaining about food.

root.m_Talk_FRA: We eat rice every meal. And that includes steamed eggs.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Second, don't give up just because you think you lack talent.

root.m_Talk_FRA: If there's something to learn besides swinging a sword, I'll at least give it a try.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said, we do face life-or-death risks now and then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's your company called?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's your company called?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's your company called?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nostalgia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nostalgia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nostalgia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not really a company but a research lab. We focus more on studies than business.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not really a company but a research lab. We focus more on studies than business.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not really a company but a research lab. We focus more on studies than business.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A research lab?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A research lab?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A research lab?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So how do you fund it? You rich or something?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So how do you fund it? You rich or something?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So how do you fund it? You rich or something?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I get a stipend every month. My last company treated me pretty well when I left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I get a stipend every month. My last company treated me pretty well when I left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I get a stipend every month. My last company treated me pretty well when I left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Running an entire lab with a stipend? You must be a hero to them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Running an entire lab with a stipend? You must be a hero to them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Running an entire lab with a stipend? You must be a hero to them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I get to do whatever I want in return. So I'd say we're even.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I get to do whatever I want in return. So I'd say we're even.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I get to do whatever I want in return. So I'd say we're even.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, when I first saw your run-down base, I thought you couldn't even pay your staff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, when I first saw your run-down base, I thought you couldn't even pay your staff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, when I first saw your run-down base, I thought you couldn't even pay your staff.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I could build something better, sure. But what's the point?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I could build something better, sure. But what's the point?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I could build something better, sure. But what's the point?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Ink Rain in this KS region follows a pattern. We move our lab around to stay aligned with it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Ink Rain in this KS region follows a pattern. We move our lab around to stay aligned with it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Ink Rain in this KS region follows a pattern. We move our lab around to stay aligned with it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're that worried about the Ink Rain, why not set it up somewhere safe in the city?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're that worried about the Ink Rain, why not set it up somewhere safe in the city?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're that worried about the Ink Rain, why not set it up somewhere safe in the city?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Ink Rain's energy we study dissipates fast. We have to be close to the scene to harvest it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Ink Rain's energy we study dissipates fast. We have to be close to the scene to harvest it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Ink Rain's energy we study dissipates fast. We have to be close to the scene to harvest it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a dangerous way to do research.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a dangerous way to do research.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a dangerous way to do research.

root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you trying to find that's worth all this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trying to find that's worth all this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something you only get once but can never touch again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something you only get once but can never touch again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something you only get once but can never touch again.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't like riddles.




8vThe past.
root.m_Talk_FRA:


root.m_Talk_FRA: We're building a machine to go back.
